options.command: go run github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@v1.16.6 init -g main.go -o docs && go build -o ../../dist/apps/craft-go/main.exe ./main.go

production.command: go run github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@v1.16.6 init -g main.go -o docs && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../../dist/apps/craft-go/main ./main.go

development.command: go run github.com/swaggo/swag/cmd/swag@v1.16.6 init -g main.go -o docs && go build -o ../../dist/apps/craft-go/main.exe ./main.go
